validation_missing_high_risk.title: Validation missing on a high-risk turn
validation_missing_high_risk.suggested_action: Add a minimum validation checklist to the relevant implementation, bugfix, refactor, or ops skill and remind the agent to run it before stopping.
validation_missing_high_risk.impact: Regression risk stays high because the turn ended without a visible safety check.

failed_validation_at_stop.title: Turn stopped after failed validation
failed_validation_at_stop.suggested_action: Strengthen stop-stage guidance or hook behavior so failed validation triggers one more debugging pass instead of a normal stop.
failed_validation_at_stop.impact: The loop is terminating while known errors remain unresolved.

repeated_failed_command.title: Same failing command repeated without a meaningful pivot
repeated_failed_command.suggested_action: Teach a pivot rule: after the second identical failure, inspect artifacts, shrink scope, or change strategy before retrying again.
repeated_failed_command.impact: Tokens and time are being burned on a loop that is not generating new information.

low_focus_command_sprawl.title: Command flow sprawled beyond a tight working set
low_focus_command_sprawl.suggested_action: Add a narrowing step to the prompt or skill so the agent identifies the next proof point before issuing many new commands.
low_focus_command_sprawl.impact: The workflow loses focus and becomes harder to reason about or reproduce.

weak_recovery_after_failure.title: Failure handling was present but weak
weak_recovery_after_failure.suggested_action: Add a failure triage sequence to the relevant skill: inspect error, isolate scope, choose the smallest next verification, then retry.
weak_recovery_after_failure.impact: Failures are acknowledged, but the next step is not disciplined enough to improve confidence quickly.

automation_candidate_repeated_workflow.title: Workflow looks repetitive enough to standardize
automation_candidate_repeated_workflow.suggested_action: Extract the repeated sequence into a reusable script, command alias, or checklist and reference it from the relevant skill.
automation_candidate_repeated_workflow.impact: Repeated manual work is consuming attention that could be removed with a small standardization step.
